data.title: Tycoon Group Raises Connected Transaction Caps and Expands JBM Ties
data.description:
Introducing TipRanks MCP for Agents

  • Deliver institutional-grade market data directly into Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and other MCP-compatible AI tools.
  • Designed for personal research, portfolio monitoring, and AI-assisted investment workflows.

Tycoon Group Holdings Limited ( (HK:3390) ) just unveiled an update.

Tycoon Group Holdings is revising the annual caps for certain continuing connected transactions with JBM Group after reviewing distribution agreements and concluding that transaction volumes are likely to exceed previous projections. The terms of the relevant agreements remain unchanged, and other distribution agreements, including those covering Europharm and Jacobson Medical products, keep their existing caps and conditions.

The company has also entered into a new Foci Distribution Agreement appointing its subsidiary Fu Qing as the exclusive distributor of Foci products in Singapore, formalizing a connected transaction due to overlapping shareholding with JBM. In addition, Tycoon Global has agreed to increase the royalty rate payable to JMM under a Trademark Licence Agreement from 20% to 30% of net selling price and to revise annual caps, reflecting expectations of higher sales of products bearing the licensed trademarks and signaling growth in licensed-brand volumes within its portfolio.

More about Tycoon Group Holdings Limited

Tycoon Group Holdings Limited is a healthcare and wellness products distributor headquartered in Hong Kong, with operations involving branded pharmaceutical and consumer health products. The company works closely with affiliated groups such as JBM Group to distribute specialty products in markets including Hong Kong and Singapore, focusing on expanding its regional presence and product portfolio.

Average Trading Volume: 742,200

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$228M

Voyah Automotive Technology Co Ltd Class H ( (HK:7489) ) has provided an announcement.

Voyah Automotive Technology held its 2025 annual general meeting in Wuhan, with shareholders representing about 80.75% of voting share capital in attendance either in person or by proxy. All directors joined the meeting, underscoring management’s engagement with investors across both its H share and domestic share base.

Shareholders approved the 2025 financial report, profit distribution plan and the appointment of accounting firms for 2026, as well as amendments to the Articles of Association. They also granted the board general mandates to issue new shares and repurchase H shares, enhancing the company’s capital management flexibility and reinforcing its governance framework.

data.title: Yuk Wing to Acquire 65% Stake in Anhui Power Technology Firm, Adds Call Option for Further Expansion
data.description:
Introducing TipRanks MCP for Agents

  • Deliver institutional-grade market data directly into Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and other MCP-compatible AI tools.
  • Designed for personal research, portfolio monitoring, and AI-assisted investment workflows.

Yuk Wing Group Holdings Ltd. ( (HK:1536) ) just unveiled an update.

Yuk Wing Group Holdings Ltd. has agreed, through a wholly owned subsidiary, to acquire a 65% equity interest in Anhui Runsheng Electric Power Technology Co., Ltd. for RMB37.5 million, with the target to become an indirect non-wholly owned subsidiary whose financial results will be consolidated into the group’s accounts. The deal is classified as a major transaction under Hong Kong listing rules and will be put to shareholders at an extraordinary general meeting, alongside approval for a call option that allows Yuk Wing to buy additional equity within 12 months, signaling a potential deepening of its stake and future expansion of the enlarged group.

Under the sale and purchase agreement, the seller will grant Yuk Wing a call option over further shares in the target at a nominal upfront consideration, with a total exercise price of RMB20.1 million if fully used. The company plans to send a circular with financial details of the target and pro forma information on the enlarged group by early July 2026, as it seeks to strengthen its position in the power technology segment and provide greater clarity to investors on the acquisition’s financial impact.

More about Yuk Wing Group Holdings Ltd.

Yuk Wing Group Holdings Ltd. is a Hong Kong-listed company that expands its portfolio through strategic acquisitions and investments. The group operates via wholly owned subsidiaries and focuses on consolidating newly acquired businesses into its existing operations to drive growth and enhance shareholder value.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Mount Everest Gold Raises Silver Purchase Cap and Secures New Supply Framework
data.description:
Introducing TipRanks MCP for Agents

  • Deliver institutional-grade market data directly into Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and other MCP-compatible AI tools.
  • Designed for personal research, portfolio monitoring, and AI-assisted investment workflows.

The latest announcement is out from CSMall Group Limited ( (HK:1815) ).

Mount Everest Gold Group Company Limited has moved to significantly expand its capacity for sourcing silver ingots as rising silver prices and stronger customer demand threaten to outgrow existing supply arrangements. The board has approved changes that broaden both the supplier base within the Longtianyong group and the group entities allowed to procure silver, aiming to enhance supply stability and flexibility.

The company plans to lift the 2026 annual cap on silver-ingot purchases under its existing framework agreement from RMB200 million to RMB500 million, reflecting the impact of price increases since late 2025. It has also agreed a new 2027-2029 framework with Zhejiang Fuyin, under which Zhejiang Fuyin Group, including Longtianyong, will continue supplying silver ingots subject to shareholder approval, securing longer-term sourcing arrangements for the group.

More about CSMall Group Limited

CSMall Group Limited, also known as Mount Everest Gold Group Company Limited, operates in the precious metals industry with a focus on sourcing and trading silver ingots. The group conducts these activities through subsidiaries such as Jiangxi Jiyin and collaborates with related parties including units of China Silver Group and Zhejiang Fuyin Group to secure stable supply channels.

data.description:
Introducing TipRanks MCP for Agents

  • Deliver institutional-grade market data directly into Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and other MCP-compatible AI tools.
  • Designed for personal research, portfolio monitoring, and AI-assisted investment workflows.

The latest announcement is out from Guoxia Technology Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2655) ).

Guoxia Technology Co., Ltd. announced that Huikai Hong Kong Economic Development Co., Ltd., a state-owned investment platform under Wuxi Huishan Economic Development Zone and a cornerstone investor in the company’s H-share IPO, has voluntarily extended the lock-up period on its stake. The investor will refrain from disposing of its 2,699,000 H shares, representing about 0.68% of H shares and 0.52% of total issued share capital, for 18 months starting from 16 June 2026.

The company said the move underscores strong confidence from a PRC state-owned cornerstone investor in its long-term value, AI-driven energy storage technology and expanding overseas business. While the locked-up stake is relatively small, the decision is seen as a positive signal for market sentiment and reinforces Guoxia’s positioning as a technology-focused energy storage player, though shareholders and potential investors are cautioned to trade the H shares carefully.

More about Guoxia Technology Co., Ltd. Class H

Guoxia Technology Co., Ltd. is a China-based company focused on energy storage solutions that integrate artificial intelligence, positioning its business in the fast-growing “AI+” energy storage segment. The company is expanding its overseas footprint, aiming to leverage its technological advantages to capture long-term growth opportunities in international energy and technology markets.

Asiaray Media Group Limited has announced an updated board composition effective 12 June 2026, confirming Vincent Lam Tak Hing as Chairman and Chief Executive Officer alongside executive director Kwan Tat Cheong and non-executive director Huang Hai. Asiaray Media Group Ltd. ( (HK:1993) ) has provided an update.

Asiaray Media Group Limited has appointed veteran accountant and corporate governance specialist Wu Tak Lung as an independent non-executive director, chairman of its audit committee and a member of its remuneration committee, effective immediately after the company’s 12 June 2026 annual general meeting. The appointment strengthens Asiaray’s audit oversight and remuneration governance at a time when regulatory and investor scrutiny of board independence and ESG reporting is intensifying in Hong Kong. YNBY International Limited has repurchased 420,000 of its own shares on the open market on 12 June 2026, representing about 0.0044% of its total issued share capital, and will hold the stock as treasury shares. The board said the move signals confidence in the company’s business outlook, is intended to enhance shareholder value, was carried out in accordance with Hong Kong listing rules, and leaves the firm with adequate public float, with further buy-backs possible when deemed appropriate.

The transaction was executed under market conditions the directors consider favourable and in the interests of all shareholders, reinforcing management’s commitment to capital management and market support. Investors are nevertheless urged to exercise caution when dealing in the company’s securities, reflecting standard risk warnings despite the board’s positive stance on the company’s prospects.

Technovator International ( (HK:1206) ) has shared an update.

Technovator International reported that shareholders approved all resolutions at its 12 June 2026 annual general meeting, including the adoption of audited consolidated financial statements under both Hong Kong and Singapore standards. The meeting also endorsed the re-election of four directors, the re-appointment of KPMG and KPMG LLP as auditors, authorization for the board to set directors’ and auditors’ remuneration, and a general mandate for the board to issue and deal in company shares, underscoring continued investor support for existing governance and capital management frameworks.

The broad-based approval of financial statements under dual reporting standards and the confirmation of the existing board and auditors reinforce continuity in Technovator’s oversight and financial disclosure practices. The fresh share issuance mandate equips management with flexibility to pursue future fundraising or strategic initiatives, signaling stable shareholder backing for the company’s current strategic direction and governance structure.

More about Technovator International

Technovator International Limited is a Singapore-incorporated company listed in Hong Kong, operating within the broader industrial and technology sector. It prepares consolidated financial statements under both Hong Kong and Singapore Financial Reporting Standards, reflecting a dual-market regulatory footing and a focus on compliance with multiple accounting regimes.
